cause_analysis.narrative: Champion Health and Wellness Clinics churned on 2026-04-22 after 28 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 56-day silence starting 2026-01-07. 4 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [SLA] 4 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-01-07 via sms, client wrote: "Hi, this is Champion Health and Wellness Clinics. Sorry that we just missed your call.   How can we help you?  You can t…" — no outbound response in 56 days.

Hi, this is Champion Health and Wellness Clinics. Sorry that we just missed your call.   How can we help you?  You can text us back here now.  Someone from the clinic will contact you.
Request Closed

Hi,  We tried reaching you again but couldn't connect. Since we haven't heard back, we will go ahead and close this for now.  Feel free to reach out anytime if you would like to revisit the Lead Connector integration or explore alternative options. We are always happy to help!
